items.title: These 3 Boring Stocks Are Delivering the Dow’s Biggest Wins in 2025
items.description: As 2025 draws to a close, the Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJIA) is having a superb year, up nearly 13% year to date. While artificial intelligence (AI)-oriented stocks continue to dominate headlines, investors might be surprised to learn that the three stocks leading this venerable index are not pure AI plays.
